title: Canada Transport Sector Quarterly Trend Sheet â€“ Q2 2024
content:
Key takeaways:

  • Quebec and British Columbia continue to lead in ZEV adoption, with Quebec showing significant growth in both ZEV sales per capita and share of total vehicle sales.
  • Overall ZEV penetration reached 12.8% in Q2 2024, a five-quarter high, representing a 37% year-over-year increase driven by growth in both BEVs and PHEVs.
  • Vehicle sales showed strong growth with an 8% year-over-year increase in Q2 2024, indicating a recovering and expanding automotive market.
  • The use of renewable fuels is increasing, with ethanol's share in gasoline and renewable diesel and biodiesel's share in diesel fuel both showing significant year-over-year growth.
author: Mansift Kaur
